description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Black chemise, has a straight neckline, adjustable spaghetti straps, padded bra cups with embroidered detail, net panel in between the bra cups, pink piping below the bust and gathers below the back yoke Material and Care Fabric: 85% polyamide and 15% spandex Trims: 100% polyester Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
